P (D) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient expressed that in the last two weeks they have had a poor appetite or has been overeating. 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
9 = No response 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
494 APTIT_OVREATG_FREQ_ADMSN_CD APTIT_OVREATG_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Poor appetite or overeating: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with which the patient has had a poor appetite or has been overeating. 0 =
